mapper.nql: CREATE SPACE IF NOT EXISTS `${ space.space }` (partition_num = ${ space.partitionNum }, replica_factor = ${ space.replicaFactor },vid_type = ${ space.fixedType });
CREATE SPACE IF NOT EXISTS `${ space.space }` (partition_num = 2, replica_factor = 1 , vid_type = ${ space.fixedType });
CREATE SPACE IF NOT EXISTS `${ space.space }` AS ${ space.model } ;
